description: No-refit transfer of pythia-160m w_r profile to held-out archs (pythia-410m, bert-base). Codex priority #1 after competitor weight map.

hypotheses.H1: Relative prediction error < 30% for top2, top4, topall on BOTH held-out archs
hypotheses.H2: Pearson r(predicted, actual) > 0.90 across 2 archs x 3 topm = 6 datapoints

null_model: Uniform competition: alpha_topm = alpha_j1_only * m (no decay)
key_prediction: If w_r shape is universal, one-calibration-parameter transfer should predict multi-competitor effects within 30%
